# Nexus0.5 Completion Next Step Reference

Source: NEXUS0.5 docs architecture donor file.
Status: adapted planning reference.

## Recommended Next Pack From Donor
Generalized integration.

## Why It Still Matters
The donor progression emphasized moving from one hardcoded integration path to reusable integration flows. That aligns with current fresh nexus doctrine and build strategy.

## Fresh Nexus Constraint
Any integration automation must remain contract-scoped and validation-gated.
